Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Erin]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Erin is a place Naberius's father came from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — There are people in Erin talking of secession.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Erin is a location where Crawlers nest.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Shera might have had ancestors from Erin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Erinin rule over Erin.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Erin is a location where tides can lead.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Erin is a location with ice fields to its south.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Erin is a region containing the port town of Kalvin’s Rest.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Erin is a location containing Consultant chapter houses.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
